market_pulse: EDC Week peak activity across all major venues; LIV and competitors heavily pushing headline DJ lineups (David Guetta, Tiësto, Steve Aoki); engagement concentrated on weekend countdown content.

weekend_readiness.label: PEAK
factors: All major competitors have heavyweight DJ bookings confirmed
LIV Nightclub and LIV Beach maintaining strong lineups
High social media activity from audience tagging and FOMO content
weekend_readiness.liv_recommendation: Maximize weekend promotion. Current lineups (@metroboomin, @crankdat, @matrodamusic for nightclub; @linska, @davidguetta, @sidepiece for beach) are competitive. Focus on last-minute bottle service deals and FOMO-driven Stories.

content_gaps.description: Multiple competitors (XS, OMNIA, Zouk) posting BTS content of DJ setup and prep work during EDC Week; LIV posting primarily lineup/countdown content.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Post BTS Stories showing DJ arrival, equipment setup, or pre-show energy behind the decks. Authenticity drives engagement during peak weeks.

content_gaps.description: Competitors actively reposting user content with event hashtags; LIV has lower UGC amplification. Audience craving featured moments.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Create branded Stories template with @livnightclub or @livbeach tags. Repost top 3-5 user posts daily. Drives participation and FOMO.

content_gaps.description: Competitors using live video/Reels during events (going live on IG); LIV primarily posting post-event clips.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Go live on IG during tonight's (Sun May 31) event with @matrodamusic. 15-min live streams drive 3-5x engagement vs static posts.

influencer_activity.mention: Confirmed headliner at LIV Nightclub May 29 (Fri). High-profile booking driving awareness among trap/hip-hop audiences.
Confirmed bi-coastal exclusive North American residency. Featured at LIV Beach May 30. GRAMMY-winning DJ, major draw.
OMNIA Nightclub May 29. Competing headline on same night as LIV's Metroboomin. Major talent conflict.
OMNIA Nightclub May 30 + OMNIA Dayclub May 31. Strong weekend presence competing against LIV Beach's Sidepiece.
Zouk Nightclub May 30 (Sat). Competing head-to-head against LIV Beach's David Guetta + OMNIA's Steve Aoki.
LIV Beach May 31 (Sun). Tech house specialists; strong late-weekend EDC Week play.

liv_outreach_targets.reason: Already tagged LIV in multiple posts (dress code content, John Summit post). High engagement with LIV audience.
liv_outreach_targets.suggested_content: Feature in LIV Beach stories during weekend events. User already drives traffic.

liv_outreach_targets.reason: Mentioned multiple times in TT content alongside LIV Beach. Audience familiar with John Summit at venue.
liv_outreach_targets.suggested_content: Repost John Summit collaboration or performance highlight. Fan base actively searches for him.

story_activity.summary: Weekend lineup countdown: Metroboomin (Fri), Crankdat (Sat), Matroda (Sun). High engagement on Stories with @livlv handle callout.
EDC Week dayclub lineup: Linska (Fri), David Guetta (Sat), Sidepiece (Sun). Heavy promotion with 42K followers seeing content.
MDW (Memorial Day Weekend) + EDC Week lineup: Justin Credible (Mon), Tiësto (Thu), Steve Aoki (Fri), Afrojack (Sun). Aggressive EDC Week push.
EDC Week dayclub: Louis the Child (Fri), Zedd (Sat), Afrojack (Sun). Direct competition with LIV Beach and TAO Beach.
Memorial Day Weekend bookings: DJ Vice (5/27), Acraze (5/29), Marshmello (5/30), Subtronics (5/30). Split-day bookings showing high demand.
May 30 (Sat): Meduza. June 5-6: THE PIT with Bolo the DJ and RL Grime. Actively building post-EDC Week calendar.
EDC Week featuring world-class artists: Porter Robinson, DJ Snake, Steve Aoki, Rozmus. Heavy promotion with Tiësto April 11 mention (past event, but residency signaling).
R&Bae Wednesdays + MDW lineups: DJ Drama (5/22), Big X Tha Plug (5/23). Cardi B after-party history mentioned in TT content.

venues.summary: EDC Week peak weekend (May 29-31) with Metroboomin, Crankdat, Matroda; 90K IG followers, active TT presence with #LIVLasVegas #EDCWeek.

raw_posts.content_summary: EDC Week weekend headline lineup announcement: Fri @metroboomin, Sat @crankdat, Sun @matrodamusic. Meet under the Halo motif.
EDC Week at LIV Las Vegas energy content. Multiple user videos featuring John Summit mentions and Discolines dress code collaboration.
LIV Nightclub official site shows events calendar and guestlist info. 702.984.9370 text number for free guestlist promotion.

venues.summary: EDC Week dayclub headliners: Linska (Fri), David Guetta (Sat), Sidepiece (Sun); 42K IG followers; strong TT engagement on outfit/experience content.

raw_posts.content_summary: All-new day life oasis positioning. Fri @linska, Sat @davidguetta, Sun @sidepiece. Direct competitor to OMNIA Dayclub and TAO Beach.
User UGC showing John Summit experience and pool season 2026 content. Multiple creators posting outfit inspiration and day-club vibe.
Discolines hashtag featured in LIV Beach outfit content. Influencer cross-promotion driving traffic.

Insider tips for XS Nightclub and outfit transition content. Jeff Bezos sighting viral content drives curiosity and celebrity appeal.
